library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: the resolved artifact is a tiny Quarkus bootstrap utility JAR with only public static ClassLoaderHelper methods and no runtime dependencies, services, Docker-backed integrations, environment variables, or system properties required for meaningful coverage.
risks: The reported failure appears related to dependency resolution for the newly published 3.37.0.CR1 artifact rather than missing test setup; local Gradle verification remains authoritative.
Coverage will likely remain limited to deterministic helper-method behavior because this artifact exposes only class-name/resource-name conversion and JDK-package prefix checks.
